title: The Attack of Amr b. al-Zubayr / zo The Kufans ' Invitation to Husayn and the Mission of Muslim b. 'Agil / x6 Continuation of 'Ammir al-Duhni's Account from Abu Ja'far / zo Abu Mikhnaf's Account / zz
description: Muhammad b. 'Umar al - Wagidi has mentioned that `Amr b. Said b. al-'AO al-Ashdaq came to Medina in Ramadan 6o (June, 68o). When the people of Medina visited him, they found him to be a dignified and eloquent man. ;. Qur'an, z8:zz.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 19
